characters.name: Rama
characters.description: The avatar of Vishnu, embodiment of Dharma.

characters.name: Sita
characters.description: Consort of Rama, embodiment of devotion and purity.

characters.name: Hanuman
characters.description: The monkey god, devotee of Rama, symbol of strength and humility.

characters.name: Laxmana
characters.description: Brother of Rama, embodiment of loyalty.

characters.name: Bharata
characters.description: Brother of Rama, embodiment of sacrifice.

characters.name: Shatrughna
characters.description: Brother of Rama, slayer of enemies.

characters.name: Vali
characters.description: King of Kishkindha, brother of Sugriva.

characters.name: Sugriva
characters.description: King of Kishkindha, ally of Rama.

characters.name: Angada
characters.description: Son of Vali, nephew of Sugriva.

characters.name: Ravana
characters.description: King of Lanka, the ten-headed demon.

characters.name: Dasharatha
characters.description: King of Ayodhya, father of Rama.

characters.name: Janaka
characters.description: King of Mithila, father of Sita.

locations.name: Ayodhya
locations.description: Capital of Kosala kingdom, birthplace of Rama.

locations.name: Kishkindha
locations.description: Monkey kingdom ruled by Vali and then Sugriva.

locations.name: Dandaka
locations.description: The dense forest where Rama lived during exile.

locations.name: Panchavati
locations.description: The place in the forest where Sita was abducted.

events.name: Exile
events.description: Rama's fourteen-year journey into the forest.

events.name: Swayamvara
events.description: The ceremony where Rama won Sita's hand.

events.name: Abduction
events.description: The kidnapping of Sita by Ravana.

events.name: War
events.description: The great battle between Rama's army and Ravana's forces.

events.name: Coronation
events.description: Rama's return to Ayodhya as King.
